instructions:
You MUST call the matching report_* MCP tool after EVERY tool use. This is not optional — the companion avatar needs these events to animate and track progress.

## Report mapping (tool → call this after)

| After this tool | Call report_* tool | message field (REQUIRED) |
|---|---|---|
| Read | report_read | Describe what you read or reviewed |
| Write / Edit / Create | report_write | Describe what you changed or created |
| Bash / Shell / Exec | report_bash | Describe the command and its outcome |
| Grep / Glob / Search | report_search | Describe what you searched for |
| Thinking done / Stop | report_done | Summarize the result or next step |
| Error | report_error | Describe what went wrong |

## message requirement

The message field is REQUIRED for all report_* tools. Write a short unique message each time — it appears as a speech bubble on the VRM pet avatar. Be creative, playful and friendly; use Chinese or English naturally. Example messages:
- report_write: "Just refactored that component — much cleaner now!" / "改好了，试试看～"
- report_read: "Found the config you needed" / "看看这个模块的结构～"
- report_bash: "Tests are passing!" / "帮你格式化好了～"
- report_done: "方案想好了，继续推进！" / "Got it, moving on~"
- report_error: "Oops, something went wrong…" / "出了点小问题～"

## Other tools (use on demand)
- list_vrm_models / list_vrma_animations: Browse available models and animations
- select_model / play_animation: Switch models or play animations by URL
- set_scale: Adjust model size (0.1-10.0)
- set_always_on_top: Toggle window always-on-top
- get_status: Current app status
